case_title: DAN D. BETCHART RESPONDENT VS. YANES, CARLOS DBA CHARLES TOW SERVICE et al APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT YANES, CARLOS DBA CHARLES TOW SERVICE AYERS, ROBERT DBA CHARLES TOW SERVICE AS TO RESPONDENT BETCHART, DAN D. HEARING SET FOR JUL-09-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL

DEPT. 525: PRO TEM JUDGE NANCY J. NEWMAN, CLERK-BETH WILBER: C/C FOR TRIAL DE NOVO ON SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT APPEARED IN PRO PER. BOTH PARTIES PRESENTED THEIR RESPECTIVE CASES AND SUBMITTED THE MATTER; THE COURT RULES FOR THE PLAINTIF; SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2003 - OFF CALENDAR
